ab: rarasun cimu ni papsibaq i ragiyax kisa’.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: payux kuwi’ i ragiyax mha i yaya’.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: rarasun cimu ni papsibaq i claq kisa’.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: mausa’ ta’ i maxmux cu rawq qu?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: mausa’ ta’ inu’ i kisa’?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: rarasun ta’ ni papsibaq i siyag na luliyung.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: mausa’ ta’ inu’ i kisa’?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: rarasun ta’ i ragiyax ni papsibaq.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: mausa’ ta’ i siyag na luliyung i kisa’ qu?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: iqaat, rarasun ta’ i ragiyax ni papsibaq.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: mausa’ ta’ i ragiyax i kisa’ qu?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: iqaat, mausa’ ta’ i claq i kisa’.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: papsibaq, nanuwan ku tatalun ta’ i siyag na luliyung?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: mausa’ ta’ umangay cu qaqlayngan.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: papsibaq, nanuwan ku tatalun ta’ i ragiyax?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: mausa’ ta’ umangay cu tatayu’.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: nanuwan ku usalan ta’ i claq?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: mausa’ ta’ i claq mitaal cku pinumuwa’ ta’ ka qatiyay, panabaq kiya a qatahi’, buwayng yo!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: papsibaq, mausa’ ta’ lumanguy i luliyung qu?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: iqaat, mausa’ ta’ umangay cu qaqlayngan.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: papsibaq, mausa’ ta’ mumuwa’ cu paparuxaw i claq qu?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: mausa’ ta’ i gumaxbux cu rawq i kisa’.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: kiya a qaqlayngan i haca ka manbahaag tagi runi manbahaag tagi haca.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: yani kuiwng na’ mitaal cu maqiyanux cubalay ka qaqlayngan.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: kiya a tatayu’ i haca ka manbahaag tagi runi manbahaag tagi haca.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ye! wa! balayq mu tatayu’, magbatunux cubalay.
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: kiya a tatayu’ i haca ka manbahaag tagi runi manbahaag tagi haca.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: iqaat tatayu’ ku haca, haca ga tatina’ na buwayng.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: asi angay i runi, laxi ku musa’ tatuhi’ cuqaang yo!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: uwal, qaat cami mausa’ tatuhi’ cuqaang.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: laxi ku maktaliyum, anahiyahiyaw i humakay naki ini’ kataku.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: maki nabuwibuwisun mu i talan.
en: I want to see them right away.
